stemHtml: The visibility transmitted in a METAR is…

options.a: given by transmissometer when the visibility is below 1 500 metres.
options.b: the lowest observed in a 360° scan from the meteorological station.
options.c: the maximum determined by a meteorologist in a 360° scan at the horizon.
options.d: the greatest value, which is reached within at least half the horizon circle of the aerodrome.
